glosses.ja: せいぜい; 多くても

translations.en: I’ll stay at most an hour.
translations.es: Me quedaré como mucho una hora.
translations.fr: Je reste une heure tout au plus.
translations.pt: Eu fico no máximo uma hora.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ ở nhiều nhất là một tiếng.
translations.hi: मैं ज्यादा से ज्यादा एक घंटे रहूँगा.
translations.el: Θα μείνω το πολύ μια ώρα.
translations.id: Saya akan tinggal paling lama satu jam.
translations.ja: 長くても一時間しかいない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative 1st person singular of 'bleiben' ('to stay'); predicates the subject.
Scalar limiting adverb meaning 'at most'; sets an upper bound on the duration.
Indefinite article, feminine accusative singular; determines the measure noun 'Stunde'.
Common noun, feminine; accusative singular as a temporal measure phrase indicating duration.

translations.en: That takes at most ten minutes.
translations.es: Eso tarda como mucho diez minutos.
translations.fr: Ça prend tout au plus dix minutes.
translations.it: Ci vogliono al massimo dieci minuti.
translations.pt: Isso leva no máximo dez minutos.
translations.he: זה לוקח לכל היותר עשר דקות.
translations.tr: Bu en fazla on dakika sürer.
translations.vi: Cái đó cùng lắm mất mười phút.
translations.ar: هذا يستغرق عشر دقائق على الأكثر.
translations.hi: इसमें ज्यादा से ज्यादा दस मिनट लगते हैं.
translations.el: Αυτό διαρκεί το πολύ δέκα λεπτά.
translations.id: Itu paling lama butuh sepuluh menit.
translations.ro: Asta durează cel mult zece minute.
translations.ja: それは長くても10分しかかからない。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun, nominative singular; subject referring to a previously mentioned event/thing.
Finite main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular of 'dauern' ('to last').
Scalar limiting adverb; sets an upper bound for the duration.
Cardinal numeral; quantifies the following noun 'Minuten'.
Common noun, plural; accusative plural as a temporal measure phrase with 'dauern'.

sentences.target: Er trinkt heute höchstens ein Bier.

translations.de: Er trinkt heute höchstens ein Bier.
translations.en: He’s having at most one beer today.
translations.es: Hoy va a tomar como mucho una cerveza.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, il boira tout au plus une bière.
translations.it: Oggi al massimo beve una birra.
translations.ko: 오늘은 많아야 맥주 한 잔만 마셔요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他今天最多喝一杯啤酒。
translations.yue: 佢今日最多飲一杯啤酒。
translations.ru: Сегодня он выпьет максимум одно пиво.
translations.pt: Hoje ele vai tomar, no máximo, uma cerveja.
translations.he: היום הוא ישתה לכל היותר בירה אחת.
translations.tr: Bugün en fazla bir bira içer.
translations.vi: Hôm nay anh ấy cùng lắm uống một ly bia.
translations.ar: اليوم سيشرب على الأكثر كأس بيرة واحدة.
translations.nl: Vandaag drinkt hij hoogstens één biertje.
translations.uk: Сьогодні він вип’є щонайбільше одне пиво.
translations.hi: आज वह ज्यादा से ज्यादा एक बीयर पिएगा.
translations.el: Σήμερα θα πιει το πολύ μια μπίρα.
translations.nb: I dag drikker han maks én øl.
translations.id: Hari ini dia paling banyak minum satu gelas bir.
translations.sv: Idag dricker han högst en öl.
translations.ro: Astăzi bea cel mult o bere.
translations.cs: Dnes si dá maximálně jedno pivo.
translations.da: I dag drikker han højst en øl.
translations.fi: Tänään hän juo korkeintaan yhden oluen.
translations.ja: 今日はせいぜいビールを一杯だけ飲む。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular masculine nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular of 'trinken' ('to drink'); takes a direct object.
Temporal adverb; specifies the time of the event.
Scalar limiting adverb; sets an upper bound on the quantity consumed.
Indefinite article, neuter accusative singular; determines the direct object 'Bier'.
Common noun, neuter; accusative singular as the direct object of 'trinkt'.

sentences.target: Wir zahlen dafür höchstens fünfzig Euro.

translations.de: Wir zahlen dafür höchstens fünfzig Euro.
translations.en: We’ll pay at most fifty euros for that.
translations.es: Pagaremos como mucho cincuenta euros por eso.
translations.fr: Nous paierons tout au plus cinquante euros pour ça.
translations.it: Pagheremo al massimo cinquanta euro per quello.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们最多为那件东西付五十欧元。
translations.yue: 嗰樣嘢我哋最多俾五十歐羅。
translations.ru: Мы заплатим за это максимум пятьдесят евро.
translations.pt: Vamos pagar no máximo cinquenta euros por isso.
translations.he: נשלם על זה לכל היותר חמישים יורו.
translations.tr: Buna en fazla elli avro öderiz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi cùng lắm trả năm mươi euro cho cái đó.
translations.ar: سندفع لهذا خمسين يورو على الأكثر.
translations.nl: We betalen daar hoogstens vijftig euro voor.
translations.uk: Ми заплатимо за це щонайбільше п’ятдесят євро.
translations.hi: हम इसके लिए ज्यादा से ज्यादा पचास यूरो देंगे.
translations.pl: Zapłacimy za to najwyżej pięćdziesiąt euro.
translations.el: Θα πληρώσουμε γι’ αυτό το πολύ πενήντα ευρώ.
translations.nb: Vi betaler maks femti euro for det.
translations.id: Untuk itu kami paling banyak membayar lima puluh euro.
translations.sv: Vi betalar högst femtio euro för det.
translations.ro: Plătim cel mult cincizeci de euro pentru asta.
translations.cs: Za to zaplatíme maximálně padesát eur.
translations.da: Vi betaler højst halvtreds euro for det.
translations.ja: それにはせいぜい50ユーロしか払わない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative 1st person plural of 'zahlen' ('to pay').
Pronominal adverb (da + für); oblique complement referring to a previously mentioned thing; functions adverbially.
Scalar limiting adverb; sets the upper bound on the amount of money.
Cardinal numeral; quantifies the currency unit 'Euro'.
Common noun denoting the currency unit; bare form used in an amount expression (accusative measure).
